name: Vegetable Lasagne (Mcdermott)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash the tofu in a bowl and add salt, nutritional yeast, spices, tomato paste.
2. Chop celery, cauliflower, and onions finely. Sauté in oil until mostly cooked.
3. Add mushrooms when sautéing vegetables. Mix all together.
4. Cook lasagne noodles in water until done (precook if desired).
5. Grease casserole pan with oil to prevent sticking.
6. Layer noodles, tomato sauce, tofu/vegetables, sautéed chard, more sauce, noodles, tofu, and additional chard.
7. Top with more sauce.
8. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C) or 375°F (190°C). Cook for about 35 minutes until bubbly and hot.
SERVE!
